proposal_text:
Title: Echoes of Lumina: Threads of Restoration
Concept: Where forgotten memories bloom, destinies are woven anew.
Website Product Description: Step into a world shattered by forgotten history, where the very fabric of reality is frayed. As an Echo Weaver, you possess the unique ability to perceive and collect "Lumina fragments" – shimmering crystals that hold the emotional imprints of past events. These aren't just echoes; they are a tangible resource for healing the present. Immerse yourself in 'chronal echoes,' solving puzzles to relive pivotal moments and uncover the secrets of a broken world. You'll use the Lumina to mend devastated landscapes and nurture life back into existence, weaving forgotten narratives to restore balance. But every memory harvested, every thread rewoven, comes with ethical choices that will shape the future. Experience a deeply emotional adventure of empathy and catharsis, as you piece together a broken past to bring forth a vibrant, new destiny.

Title: Aetherium Drift
Concept: Forge your destiny across a universe that bends to your will and whispers your past.
Website Product Description: Embark on an unparalleled journey of discovery in Aetherium Drift, a groundbreaking science fiction adventure where the very fabric of reality is yours to command. Explore a vast, ever-changing cosmos where the laws of physics can be manipulated, leading to surprising challenges and emergent gameplay unique to your choices. Your deeply personal story unfolds not just around you, but within you, as you forge profound connections with diverse characters and your own crew against breathtaking alien backdrops. Dive into a quest of self-discovery and rediscovery, where every decision echoes across the stars, shaping your destiny and revealing humanity's place in an awe-inspiring, fluid universe. Your adventure is as unique as your own consciousness, making every playthrough an unforgettable exploration.
